summary: Verified form restructuring for 'Nova Turma' and 'Editar Turma' in SIGESC Classes page. All features tested successfully: field order, AEE/Recomposição conditional behavior, multisseriada with all school series, and backend API acceptance of empty education_level for special programs.
critical_code_review_comments: Code correctly implements isProgramaEspecialSemNivel for ['aee', 'aulas_complementares'] to hide Nível de Ensino
getAllAvailableGradeLevels() returns series from all education levels for AEE/Recomposição multisseriada
handleAtendimentoChange() correctly clears education_level when switching to AEE/Recomposição
Backend models.py line 749 has education_level: Optional[str] = None allowing empty values
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_AEE_MULTI_UI class during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form restructuring verified. Test school 'ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA' (220d4022-ec5e-4fb6-86fc-9233112b87b2) has aee=true, atendimento_integral=true, fundamental_anos_iniciais=true. Note: aulas_complementares is NOT enabled for any school currently, so 'Recomposição da Aprendizagem' option doesn't appear in dropdown - but the label change is correctly implemented in code (line 199). AEE class 'AEE' exists with is_multi_grade=true and 5 series.

verified_features.feature: Field order: Ano Letivo -> Escola -> Tipo de Atendimento/Programa -> Nome da Turma -> Nível de Ensino
verified_features.evidence: Labels in order verified via Playwright: 1.Ano Letivo, 2.Escola, 3.Tipo de Atendimento/Programa, 4.Nome da Turma, 5.Nível de Ensino, 6.Série/Etapa, 7.Turno

verified_features.feature: AEE selected: Nível de Ensino hidden
AEE selected: Turma Multisseriada checkbox shown unconditionally
verified_features.evidence: class-multi-grade-checkbox visible immediately after selecting AEE

verified_features.feature: AEE + Multisseriada: Shows series from ALL education levels
verified_features.evidence: 11 series shown including 1º-9º Ano and EJA etapas from getAllAvailableGradeLevels()

verified_features.feature: Turma Regular selected: Nível de Ensino visible
Escola Integral selected: Nível de Ensino visible
Create AEE multisseriada with 2+ series: saves correctly
verified_features.evidence: Created TEST_AEE_MULTI_UI with 2 series via UI, success message shown

verified_features.feature: Edit existing AEE class: loads correctly
verified_features.evidence: Edit modal for AEE class showed Turma Multisseriada checked with 5 series selected

verified_features.feature: Backend accepts turma with empty education_level for AEE

verified_features.evidence: Classes.js line 199: label: 'Recomposição da Aprendizagem' for aulas_complementares

test_results.note_on_recomposicao: The label 'Recomposição da Aprendizagem' is correctly implemented but no school currently has aulas_complementares enabled, so it doesn't appear in the dropdown. This is expected behavior - options only show based on school configuration.
